short_description: Full reliable squat run with clear depth
interpretation: Strong success example: all processed frames are valid usable and reliable with sufficient squat depth.
reason_for_success_failure: High keypoint reliability no warning frames and clear top/middle/bottom motion.

short_description: Reliable squat run with balanced phases
interpretation: Successful example with reliable keypoints full usable-knee coverage and sufficient depth.
reason_for_success_failure: All processed frames are reliable and no frame warnings were recorded.

short_description: Usable squat run with minor warnings
interpretation: Successful but imperfect example: the run reaches sufficient depth and keeps full usable-knee coverage while showing minor warnings.
reason_for_success_failure: Mostly reliable pose tracking with some asymmetry and tentative-angle warnings worth discussing in the report.

interpretation: Failed technique example with reliable keypoints but no frame reaching sufficient depth.
reason_for_success_failure: Pose tracking is strong but selected knee angle never reaches the configured depth threshold.

interpretation: Failed technique example: the run is mostly top-phase or unknown and never reaches sufficient depth.
reason_for_success_failure: Insufficient depth combines with low confidence and unavailable/tentative knee angles across all frames.

short_description: Insufficient-depth run with very low reliability
interpretation: Failed technique/reliability example: only a small fraction of frames are reliable and depth is insufficient.
reason_for_success_failure: Low reliability low confidence and tentative or unavailable angles limit technique conclusions.
